questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "quote"?
questions.explanation: "quote" có nghĩa là "trích dẫn".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "declare"?
questions.explanation: "declare" có nghĩa là "tuyên bố".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "respond"?
questions.explanation: "respond" có nghĩa là "phản hồi".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "conversation"?
questions.explanation: "conversation" có nghĩa là "cuộc trò chuyện".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reported"?
questions.explanation: "reported" có nghĩa là "được thuật lại".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "speech"?
questions.explanation: "speech" có nghĩa là "lời nói/bài phát biểu".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "claim"?
questions.explanation: "claim" có nghĩa là "tuyên bố".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "mention"?
questions.explanation: "mention" có nghĩa là "đề cập".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "admit"?
questions.explanation: "admit" có nghĩa là "thừa nhận".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "deny"?
questions.explanation: "deny" có nghĩa là "phủ nhận".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "explain"?
questions.explanation: "explain" có nghĩa là "giải thích".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "announce"?
questions.explanation: "announce" có nghĩa là "thông báo".

questions.question: Choose the best word: Direct _____ uses quotation marks.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Direct speech uses quotation marks." — từ đúng là "speech" (lời nói/bài phát biểu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed she was innocent.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She claimed she was innocent." — từ đúng là "claim" (tuyên bố).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ed that he was busy.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He mentioned that he was busy." — từ đúng là "mention" (đề cập).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ted he was wrong.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He admitted he was wrong." — từ đúng là "admit" (thừa nhận).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She denied taking the money. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She denied taking the money." — từ đúng là "deny" (phủ nhận).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ed how it worked.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He explained how it worked." — từ đúng là "explain" (giải thích).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They _____d the news.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They announced the news." — từ đúng là "announce" (thông báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed about the noise.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She complained about the noise." — từ đúng là "complain" (phàn nàn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____d to come early.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He promised to come early." — từ đúng là "promise" (hứa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed us about the road.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She warned us about the road." — từ đúng là "warn" (cảnh báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____d me to rest.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He advised me to rest." — từ đúng là "advise" (khuyên).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed going by train.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She suggested going by train." — từ đúng là "suggest" (gợi ý).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He said he ___ tired.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: present 'am' shifts to past 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She told me she ___ busy.
questions.explanation: Backshift of 'is' to 'was' in reported speech.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They said they ___ come the next day.
questions.explanation: 'Will' becomes 'would' in reported speech.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He asked where I ___.
questions.explanation: Reported question uses statement word order, past tense.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ finished her work.
questions.explanation: Present perfect shifts to past perfect ('had').

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He told me he ___ help me.
questions.explanation: 'Can' becomes 'could' in reported speech.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ English every day.
questions.explanation: Present simple becomes past simple.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He said he ___ go to the party.
questions.explanation: 'May' becomes 'might'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They said they ___ seen the film.
questions.explanation: Present perfect → past perfect.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She asked if I ___ free.
questions.explanation: Reported yes/no question uses 'if' and backshift.

questions.question: Which English word means "trích dẫn"?
questions.explanation: "trích dẫn" trong tiếng Anh là "quote".

questions.question: Which English word means "tuyên bố"?
questions.explanation: "tuyên bố" trong tiếng Anh là "declare".

questions.question: Which English word means "phản hồi"?
questions.explanation: "phản hồi" trong tiếng Anh là "respond".

questions.question: Which English word means "cuộc trò chuyện"?
questions.explanation: "cuộc trò chuyện" trong tiếng Anh là "conversation".

questions.question: Which English word means "được thuật lại"?
questions.explanation: "được thuật lại" trong tiếng Anh là "reported".

questions.question: Which English word means "lời nói/bài phát biểu"?
questions.explanation: "lời nói/bài phát biểu" trong tiếng Anh là "speech".
